데살로니가전서 5:1.content: But concerning the times and the seasons, brothers, you have no need that anything be written to you.

데살로니가전서 5:2.content: For you yourselves know well that the day of the Lord comes like a thief in the night.

데살로니가전서 5:3.content: For when they are saying, “Peace and safety,” then sudden destruction will come on them, like birth pains on a pregnant woman. Then they will in no way escape.

데살로니가전서 5:4.content: But you, brothers, aren’t in darkness, that the day should overtake you like a thief.

데살로니가전서 5:5.content: You are all children of light and children of the day. We don’t belong to the night, nor to darkness,

데살로니가전서 5:6.content: so then let’s not sleep, as the rest do, but let’s watch and be sober.

데살로니가전서 5:7.content: For those who sleep, sleep in the night; and those who are drunk are drunk in the night.

데살로니가전서 5:8.content: But since we belong to the day, let’s be sober, putting on the breastplate of faith and love, and for a helmet, the hope of salvation.

데살로니가전서 5:9.content: For God didn’t appoint us to wrath, but to the obtaining of salvation through our Lord Jesus Christ,

데살로니가전서 5:10.content: who died for us, that, whether we wake or sleep, we should live together with him.

데살로니가전서 5:11.content: Therefore exhort one another, and build each other up, even as you also do.

데살로니가전서 5:12.content: But we beg you, brothers, to know those who labor among you, and are over you in the Lord, and admonish you,

데살로니가전서 5:13.content: and to respect and honor them in love for their work’s sake. Be at peace among yourselves.

데살로니가전서 5:14.content: We exhort you, brothers: Admonish the disorderly; encourage the faint-hearted; support the weak; be patient toward all.

데살로니가전서 5:15.content: See that no one returns evil for evil to anyone, but always follow after that which is good for one another and for all.

데살로니가전서 5:18.content: In everything give thanks, for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus toward you.

데살로니가전서 5:21.content: Test all things, and hold firmly that which is good.

데살로니가전서 5:22.content: Abstain from every form of evil.

데살로니가전서 5:23.content: May the God of peace himself sanctify you completely. May your whole spirit, soul, and body be preserved blameless at the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ.

데살로니가전서 5:24.content: He who calls you is faithful, who will also do it.

데살로니가전서 5:26.content: Greet all the brothers with a holy kiss.

데살로니가전서 5:27.content: I solemnly command you by the Lord that this letter be read to all the holy brothers.

데살로니가전서 5:28.content: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you. Amen.
